statement: This record remains negative evidence on build 26100: the repo did not produce enough supporting proof to promote it into a normal actionable surface.
gating_reason: Archived audit trail only. Keep this out of the normal tweak surface.

links.title: VS Code documentation: Default settings reference
links.summary: VS Code documents git.autofetch in its settings reference as the supported control surface for background Git autofetch behavior.

links.title: VS Code documentation: Source Control FAQ
links.summary: The FAQ explicitly says the auto fetch feature can be disabled with the git.autofetch setting.
